results.title: UK National Lottery set for Powerball launch this month
results.description: UK National Lottery operator Allwyn has confirmed the launch date for its new Powerball game, with the first draw to take place on 23 July

results.title: NSE SME Teja Engineering switches into top gear with a stellar listing
results.description: Teja Engineering Industries traded at Rs 438.90 on the NSE, a 99.50% premium to the issue price of Rs 220.

results.title: Lidl shares update on new supermarket as summer launch set to be missed
results.description: Lidl has shared an update on when its Hunton Bridge store off the A41 will open and it now looks several months away.

results.title: OPEC+ approves modest August production increase amid price slide
results.description: NEW YORK CITY, New York: Seven members of the OPEC+ alliance have agreed to modestly increase oil production in August, extending a series of monthly output hikes as crude prices continue to fall from highs reached during the recent conflict involving Iran. results.title: Volumes jump at Info Edge (India) Ltd counter
results.description: Info Edge (India) Ltd saw volume of 131.39 lakh shares by 14:14 IST on NSE, a 6.69 fold spurt over two-week average daily volume of 19.65 lakh shares
